summary: UI/Logic Fixes Testing (FIX A-H) - All fixes verified PASSED. Live screen shows 'Punti Ufficiali' for COMPLETED matchdays. Predictions save button hidden for COMPLETED. Rankings single league shows trophy header. Admin dropdown for matchday numbers working. Admin card has description text.

minor.issue: Backend returns matches unsorted by start_time - frontend sorts them client-side. Consider sorting server-side for consistency.

FIX_A.description: Live screen 'Punti Ufficiali' vs 'Punti Provvisori' for COMPLETED matchday
FIX_A.evidence: Screenshot shows 'PUNTI UFFICIALI' label on live screen for completed giornata 9. Backend returns matchday_status=COMPLETED correctly from /api/live/{id}.

FIX_B.description: Predictions tab - save button hidden when matchday COMPLETED
FIX_B.evidence: Screenshot shows predictions screen with 'GIORNATA COMPLETATA' badge and NO save button visible. Code at predictions.tsx lines 455-472 wraps footer in {!isCompleted && ...}

FIX_C.description: Backend /api/home matchdays_played counts only COMPLETED matchdays
FIX_C.evidence: API returns user_summary.matchdays_played=2. Home screen shows 'GIORNATE: 2'. Backend aggregation at server.py lines 476-494 filters by completed_md_ids.

FIX_D.evidence: Frontend sorts matches client-side at predictions.tsx lines 307-310. Sort uses ascending order by start_time (ta - tb).

FIX_E.description: Rankings screen - single league shows header with trophy, not chip selector
FIX_E.evidence: Screenshot shows '🏆 Lega Amici' as simple header at top (not blue chip selector). Code at rankings.tsx lines 214-220 checks leagues.length === 1 and renders singleLeagueHeader.

FIX_G.description: Admin dropdown 1-40 for matchday number (not text input)
FIX_G.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Seleziona Numero Giornata' modal with picker list (Giornata 3, 4, 5, 7, 11, 12...). Shows only available numbers. Is a dropdown/picker, not text input.

FIX_H.description: Admin card in profile has description text
FIX_H.evidence: Screenshot shows admin profile with 'ADMIN CONSOLE' card and 'Gestisci stagioni, giornate e partite' description text visible.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ FIX A: Live screen correctly shows 'Punti Ufficiali' when matchday_status=COMPLETED (getPointsLabel function)
✓ FIX B: Save button wrapped in {!isCompleted && ...} - correctly hidden for completed matchdays
✓ FIX C: matchdays_played aggregation filters by completed_md_ids from COMPLETED matchdays only
✓ FIX D: Frontend sorts matches by start_time client-side using .sort((a,b) => ta - tb)
✓ FIX E: Single league renders singleLeagueHeader with trophy icon instead of chip selector
✓ FIX G: Matchday number uses picker/dropdown showing available numbers, not text input
✓ FIX H: Admin card shows 'Gestisci stagioni, giornate e partite' description text
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 fixes (A-H, excluding F which was same as E) verified working correctly. Live screen shows 'Punti Ufficiali' for COMPLETED matchdays. Predictions save button hidden when matchday COMPLETED. Rankings single league shows trophy header. Admin matchday dropdown working with available numbers. Admin card has description text.
screenshots: .screenshots/admin_nuova_modal.png - Admin new matchday modal with dropdown
